calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:17am
Judge Pro Tem Donald Drummond, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Both parties are present in Pro Per, and sworn. Respondent, Jessie Rubin, testifies in the narrative. Appellant, Moises Valencia, testifies in the narrative.
EXHR1 Original rental agreement
The Judge reviews Ms. Rubin's oral objection to Mr. Valencia's motion to vacate.
EXHR2 Copy of a citation Ms. Rubin's believes is relevant to the case.
EXHAA Statement of case
EXHR3 Series of emails
10:50am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-26-2008 Denied

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 05:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Judgment Entered
